# bgi Development Guidelines

Auto-generated from all feature plans. Last updated: 2025-10-01

## Active Technologies
- Rust 1.80+ (Edition 2021) + minifb (visual backend), bgi-stroked-fonts (font rendering) (002-add-inputs-and)

- PGM file output for debugging/testing (002-add-inputs-and)

src/
tests/
